items.text: Ensure no charge when shipping back the modified bucket cover
items.raw: When you ship it back to me, please be sure to not charge me for it again. I have already paid for this

items.text: Modify future builds to add hole at opposite end for tension strap support
items.raw: For future builds of this or when we go to modify the other ones MS Power purchased (there were 4 in total, we have fixed 1), we need to also add a hole at the opposite end of where the "tension strap hole" is.
